## Curation Goal

## Affected Rooms

List the room names or areas that need curation.

## Curation Scope

- [ ] Layer renaming (per layer_spec.md)
- [ ] Collision boundary annotation
- [ ] NPC spawn point annotation
- [ ] Event trigger annotation
- [ ] World file stitching
- [ ] Other:
